differences: Completed shopping-list rows show MVP's available status text instead of the prototype's relative completion phrase because the current shopping history contract does not expose completed_at.
The shared Wave1 bottom-tab pantry icon has a slightly different glyph shape from the fixed prototype and is inherited from the already-merged shared mobile tab component.
suggestions: If the official shopping history contract later adds a completion timestamp, append the relative completed text in the mobile shopping history subtitle.
Keep any bottom-tab icon reshaping in a shared navigation follow-up instead of widening this MYPAGE-only PR.
reasoning: The mobile MYPAGE default menu, recipebook list, and shopping-history list now match the fixed reference structure, colors, spacing, radius, typography scale, app-bar placement, and bottom-tab placement closely. Remaining differences are classified contract/shared-navigation follow-ups, so unclassified visual differences are 0.
